local_training.data_provenance: The accepted checkpoint was trained on deterministic tau2 telecom mobile-data rule-planner traces replayed against tau2 and turn-sliced locally; despite the repo name, it was not trained on GPT-5.5-generated data.
local_training.leakage_note: The generated training set excluded the reported 20-task benchmark screen, so the checkpoint was not trained on those exact benchmark task IDs. The result is still an in-domain tau2 telecom/mobile-data held-out screen, not a broad out-of-domain generalization claim.

rejected_data.name: tau2_telecom_all_valid.jsonl
rejected_data.reason: loss moved but did not transfer to the mobile-data benchmark

local_training.selected_reason: step-100 scored 14/20 on the tau2 telecom screen; final step-200 scored 12/20
local_training.note: Wall-clock cost varies by local hardware, cache, sequence length, layer count, and rank. Adapt the online-memory data recipe to the target domain.

planned_upgrades.fable5_gpt55_data: planned upgrade data for broader generalization; not used for the accepted checkpoint
planned_upgrades.layer_sweeps: compare 2-layer, 6-layer, and deeper selective memory bands
planned_upgrades.rank_state_sweeps: measure capacity, VRAM, and benchmark behavior across ranks/state counts
planned_upgrades.selective_memory_direction: Raven-style top-k routing so each token updates a subset of recurrent memory states while preserving unselected states

benchmark.name: tau2 telecom 20-task screen
benchmark.accepted_condition: no eval-time mobile-data rule planner; no parser format-repair patch

base_checkpoint_comparisons.name: google/gemma-4-E4B-it focused tools + line verify + autostop

benchmark.excluded_diagnostics: The eval-time mobile-data rule planner / float-format fix is benchmark-specific control logic and is not included as a model comparison.
